install: export PATH="$HOME/.bun/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && command -v bun >/dev/null || { echo "bun missing from cloud snapshot; install Bun and resnapshot" >&2; exit 1; } && bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run terminal:launcher:build

terminals.name: terminal
terminals.description: Browser terminal stack — HTML :4321, PTY broker :4322. t0 is built in install and spawned by the PTY broker on connect; do not replace this command with the launcher binary alone.
